reason: Global TianChen-RV project invariants and source-of-truth boundary for this frontend lowering task.
Confirms this task must stay an execution layer after high-level MLIR and must not make RVV runtime claims without ssh rvv evidence.

Defines RVV finite i32 add/sub/mul descriptor selection from frontend family metadata.
Defines scalar finite i32 add/sub/mul descriptor selection from frontend family metadata.
Defines required lit/FileCheck, script, bundle, and CMake validation forms for frontend lowering and artifact paths.
